case_title: GLORIA WILLIAMS VS. CLIFFORD W LEW et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-10-2003 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR FERRIS, ROBERT L AS ATTORNEY FOR WILLIAMS, GLORIA
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-14-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-07-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST GLORIA WILLIAMS, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-07-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-22-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SUSAN LEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-07-2003 CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST GLORIA WILLIAMS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-19-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-03-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MITCH LYON. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-14-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST GLORIA WILLIAMS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-09-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-24-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY IRENE BURNS. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-09-2003 CONTINUED TO SEP-10-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Case dismissed by order of the court. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Proceedings reported by Joann Prior. (212) Notice sent by Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2003 Continued To Sep-10-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in propria persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/10/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by Irene Burns. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2003 Continued To Jul-09-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/9/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2003 Continued To May-07-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in pro per is sanctioned 250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/7/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by Mitch Lyon. (212)
